footer.note: A good industrial website does not sell. It reduces uncertainty.

systemStatus.title: Industrial websites are not marketing tools.
systemStatus.subtitle: They are decision systems.
systemStatus.heroSubtitle2: They assess risk, timing, and credibility.
systemStatus.indicatorText: Judicial pressure indicators – contextual, not predictive. These metrics provide decision-makers with market reality context, not forecasting tools. Industrial failures represent a subset of total business failures, with regional and temporal variations requiring nuanced interpretation.
systemStatus.clarifyDesc: Reduce uncertainty through structured information presentation aligned with actual decision scenarios.
systemStatus.reassureDesc: Build trust through proof, process visibility, and credible operational signals—not marketing claims.
systemStatus.triggerActionDesc: Enable decision with clear, context-appropriate entry points matching leader readiness and urgency.

comexOverview.title: COMEX Overview
comexOverview.subtitle: Decision Intelligence Summary
comexOverview.question: What does this system prove, concretely, and what is ready to be used now?
comexOverview.proof1: Industrial websites fail not because of traffic, but because they do not reduce uncertainty.
comexOverview.proof2: Decision-makers do not browse — they assess risk, timing, and credibility.
comexOverview.proofItem7: Human interactions start at a higher level of maturity
comexOverview.takeaway: This interface proves that a website can function as a decision support system — not a communication tool.
comexOverview.modulesDelivered: Modules delivered in the current system
comexOverview.allModulesConnected: All modules are connected and designed to work as a single decision system.
comexOverview.dataset1Detail2: Source logic: Banque de France / Altares (proxy usage explained)
comexOverview.allDatasetsLocal: All datasets are embedded locally. No external APIs or live dependencies.
comexOverview.ready1: The system is fully navigable end-to-end
comexOverview.ready3: Data is embedded, stable, and reproducible
comexOverview.ready4: The interface can be used in executive meetings
comexOverview.ready5: Can serve as discussion support with partners
comexOverview.ready6: Functions as credibility asset in strategic outreach
comexOverview.option1: Extend benchmarks to additional OEMs or countries
comexOverview.option2: Add side-by-side comparison between industrial actors
comexOverview.option4: Add internal decision scoring or prioritization tools
comexOverview.optionsFraming: These extensions are optional and do not affect the current system's validity.
comexOverview.langConfig3: Text content structured for clean i18n (no hard-coded strings)
comexOverview.recommendationText: French version recommended for domestic COMEX and operational teams.
